description: In the morning briefing, Jarvis flagged the Meredith Anastasio Zoom (April 7) and AA 5607 flight departure (April 8) as a potential scheduling concern, implying Wednesday was a compressed or departure-day. The correct read: Tuesday April 7 is a full work day, departure for the wedding is Wednesday April 8. The two events were not in conflict and the framing was misleading.
correction: Today = Monday April 6. Tomorrow = Tuesday April 7 (full work day). Departure for wedding = Wednesday April 8. Do not imply compression or conflict when the events are on separate days.
systemic_fix: When flagging look-ahead travel/events, always anchor to explicit day-of-week labels (Mon/Tue/Wed) and confirm no same-day conflict before surfacing as a flag.
